question_text: This clock shows the time that Cary woke up this morning.

parts.label: A
parts.text: At what time did Cary wake up? Be sure to label your answer with a.m. or p.m.

parts.label: B
parts.text: Cary left for school 1 hour and 15 minutes after he woke up. At what time did Cary leave for school? Show or explain how you got your answer.

parts.label: C
parts.text: Cary left school at 3:40. He ate lunch 4 hours before he left school. At what time did Cary eat lunch? Show or explain how you got your answer.

parts.label: D
parts.text: Cary has 45 minutes of homework. His favorite TV show is at 5:30. What is the latest time Cary can start his homework to be finished at 5:30? Show or explain how you got your answer.

visual_description: Analog clock face showing the time Cary woke up, with hour hand a little past 7 and minute hand on 12.
